item.title: How Cold Can We Actually Get?
item.description: From icy winters to extreme temperature records, this video explores how cold conditions can get and what happens when temperatures reach their limits.

item.title: What Is the Gravity Train Concept?
item.description: Explore the gravity train idea, a theoretical transportation concept that uses gravity and momentum to move through tunnels beneath the Earth.

item.title: Why Boats Still Use Knots for Speed

item.title: What if Earth stopped spinning for 5 seconds?
item.description: A brief look at what might happen if Earth stopped spinning for just 5 seconds.
